basics.name: Jane Doe
basics.label: Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Innovative Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience in building scalable web applications. Passionate about creating elegant solutions to complex problems and delivering exceptional user experiences.

highlights: Architected and implemented a microservices architecture that improved system scalability by 40%.
Led a team of 5 developers in redesigning the core product platform.
Reduced load times by 60% through aggressive caching and optimization.
Developed custom e-commerce solutions for 20+ clients.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment times by 75%.
Collaborated closely with the design team to ensure pixel-perfect implementations.
